item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 2026 Washington State Legislative Session Update: Statewide Food Security Strategy | Food Lifeline
item.description: News article "2026 Washington State Legislative Session Update: Statewide Food Security Strategy | Food Lifeline" from Food Lifeline.

item.title: 👍Angel Swanson - The Northwest Seaport Alliance
item.description: Angel Swanson signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍Ahndrea Blue - Eloise’s Cooking Pot Food Bsnk
item.description: Ahndrea Blue signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Eloise’s Cooking Pot Food Bsnk.

item.title: 👍💵Aaron Czyzewski - Food Lifeline
item.description: Aaron Czyzewski signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Food Lifeline. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Trevor Sandison - Northwest Harvest
item.description: Trevor Sandison signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Northwest Harvest. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Karen Condon - Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation
item.description: Karen Condon signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation.

item.title: Budget bills in WA Legislature would tap rainy day fund, spend heavily on legal payouts • Washington State Standard
item.description: News article "Budget bills in WA Legislature would tap rainy day fund, spend heavily on legal payouts • Washington State Standard" from Washington State Standard.

item.title: Budget bills in WA Legislature would tap rainy day fund, spend heavily on legal payouts | Cascadia Daily News
item.description: News article "Budget bills in WA Legislature would tap rainy day fund, spend heavily on legal payouts | Cascadia Daily News" from Cascadia Daily News.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: First reading, referred to Finance (Not Officially read and referred until adoption of Introduction report).

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 48; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 1.
